summary: Konekt Real Fix Patch v133 - All features verified. Backend: 16/16 tests passed. Frontend: All UI components verified via Playwright. Customer invoices show payer_name (real names like John, Mac Geoffrey, Federica). Admin invoices show customer_name, payer_name, payment_status_label (human-readable). Customer order drawer shows REAL sales contact (Konekt Administrator with email), NOT 'Konekt Sales Team' placeholder. Admin orders show 'Assigned Sales' column with real names. Route redirects working correctly (/dashboard→/account, /partner/fulfillment→/partner/orders).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Konekt Real Fix Patch v133 fully tested. All execution path issues fixed: 1) serialize_doc preserves existing UUID 'id' field over ObjectId conversion - payer_name joins now work. 2) Admin invoices show customer_name (never null), payer_name, payment_status_label (human-readable). 3) Customer order drawer shows REAL sales contact (Konekt Administrator with admin@konekt.co.tz), NOT 'Konekt Sales Team' placeholder - conditional rendering hides section when no sales data. 4) Admin orders-ops shows sales_name (real names like 'Konekt Administrator'), vendor_name, payer_name. 5) sales_assignments backfilled from 'auto-sales' to real admin user ID. 6) /dashboard/* redirects to /account/*. 7) /partner/fulfillment redirects to /partner/orders. 8) Customer invoices show Payer Name column with real names (John, Mac Geoffrey, Federica, Mac, Pendo, Moses, Don). 9) Admin invoices show Payment Status with human-readable labels ('Paid In Full', 'Payment Under Review').

customer_invoices_payer_name.details: GET /api/customer/invoices returns payer_name field. Customer invoice table shows Payer Name column with real names (John, Mac Geoffrey, Federica, Mac, Pendo, Moses, Don).

admin_invoices_enrichment.details: GET /api/admin/invoices returns customer_name (never null), payer_name, payment_status_label (human-readable: 'Paid In Full', 'Payment Under Review').

customer_order_drawer_sales_contact.details: Customer order drawer shows REAL sales contact 'Konekt Administrator' with email admin@konekt.co.tz. NO 'Konekt Sales Team' placeholder found.

admin_orders_ops_enrichment.details: GET /api/admin/orders-ops returns enriched rows with customer_name, sales_name ('Konekt Administrator'), vendor_name, payer_name.

admin_orders_ops_detail.details: GET /api/admin/orders-ops/{id} returns flat enriched fields: customer_name, sales_name, payer_name, approved_at.

vendor_orders_sales_enrichment.details: GET /api/vendor/orders returns vendor orders with sales enrichment fields.

no_konekt_sales_team_placeholder.details: No 'Konekt Sales Team' text found in customer UI. Conditional rendering hides sales section when no real data.

no_unassigned_in_admin.details: Admin orders show real sales names ('Konekt Administrator'), not 'Unassigned'.

serialize_doc_preserves_uuid.details: serialize_doc functions preserve existing UUID 'id' field over ObjectId conversion.
